topic: Conditions for Coverage for ESRD Facilities

primary_sources.name: 42 CFR 494 - Conditions for Coverage for End-Stage Renal Disease Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Complete federal regulations defining all conditions for coverage including governance, QAPI, patient care, water treatment, and infection control

primary_sources.name: CMS State Operations Manual - Appendix V: Interpretive Guidelines for ESRD Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Official CMS interpretive guidance for surveyors including detailed explanations of V-tags 100s through 600s

primary_sources.name: ESRD Conditions for Coverage Final Rule
primary_sources.relevance: Original final rule establishing current conditions for coverage framework with detailed regulatory rationale

primary_sources.name: CMS ESRD Facility Certification and Compliance
primary_sources.relevance: Current CMS guidance on facility certification requirements and compliance resources

secondary_sources.name: AAMI Standards and Recommended Practices for Dialysis
secondary_sources.relevance: Technical standards for water treatment and dialysate quality referenced in V-tags 200s
